title: Hadoop MapReduce Manifest Committer Constants
description: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest/impl' directory in Hadoop MapReduce houses the 'InternalConstants.java' file, which defines crucial constants for the manifest committer. These constants encompass durations for job and task stages, committer-related metrics, error strings, naming formats, unsupported filesystem schemas, and a save sleep interval. The core functionality of this file is the declaration and initialization of static final variables, categorized into DURATION_STATISTICS, COUNTER_STATISTICS, and miscellaneous constants. These constants are utilized across the MapReduce framework, particularly in the manifest committer, to categorize and track job and task execution stages, and to identify unsupported filesystem schemas and error conditions. The file's dependencies include imports from Java standard library and Hadoop API, specifically from 'org.apache.hadoop.thirdparty.com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet', and static import statements from 'org.apache.hadoop.fs.statistics.StoreStatisticNames' and 'org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.output.committer.manifest.ManifestCommitterStatisticNames'. This directory follows a utility package pattern, providing a centralized location for constants used across the MapReduce framework.
